name: DEADPOOL
description: Wade Wilson is the full package (or so he claims), with devastating damage output, an impenetrable shield, and swift healing. There's no limit to what Deadpool can achieve, as long as he keeps his moves flashy! And, of course, every epic attack comes with an endless barrage of witty banter!
lore: Wade Wilson prides himself on taking the kinds of jobs that other mercenaries are smart enough to turn down. When Deadpool can't win a battle with humor, charisma, and an endless supply of brutal weapons, he knows his healing factor will pick up the slack! After the Timestream Entanglement, Deadpool was recruited by the Collector to "save" rare specimens from various realities on the brink of collapse. When tasked with hunting down Rogue and Gambit, however, Deadpool betrayed his benefactor and helped his old friends escape from the Collector's Museum.

abilities.name: DUAL DESERT EAGLES - VANGUARD
abilities.description: Nobody lays a finger on my teammates! Anyone tries, and I'm firing these big boy bullets straight at their face!

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 15m, decreasing to 50% at 30m

abilities.name: THE BAN HAMMER
abilities.description: You! Yeah, you - the hyper one! Eyes off my friends. I sentence you to...whatever! Get ready to be taunted. I get bonus HP and healing, and if you whiff your abilities, you take damage, and I get even more HP!

abilities.name: MAGICAL UNICORN SHIELD!
abilities.description: Plushie power! It stops every single attack those chumps throw, giving my team a safety bubble. It's cute AND bulletproof

abilities.name: BUNNY BOUNCE
abilities.description: Yup, I can double jump in midair! During The Big Test and its upgrade, I can also stomp heads and wall jump to reset its cooldown. Stomp enemies so hard they won't get near my team!

abilities.name: HEALING FACTOR
abilities.description: Out of combat? I'm healing up, staying battle-ready to protect my team. And if I'm about to croak? Surprise! I get a free pass, and my health zooms back up. Nice try, villains

stats.Special Effect: The healing factor kicks in after Deadpool has been out of combat for 5s. If Deadpool takes more than 200 damage within a two-second window, the healing factor activates and boosts the healing

abilities.name: MAXIMUM FLAIR
abilities.description: Listen up, eyes on the prize, don't wander off! Every time my abilities land on a bad guy, the style points shoot up a notch! When it's full, I can pop my ultimate! With me on the team, you're all staying alive and fabulous!

stats.Special Effect: The ultimate ability can be unleashed after reaching an S rating. The rating is cleared if Deadpool is defeated.

abilities.name: UPGRADE!
abilities.description: I'm here to smack baddies, get XP, and shield my friends! When my XP is full, I get to upgrade an ability! Bonus: Score the final hit and force your foe into a selfie—more XP for me! I'm invincible while striking my best duckface. No photobombs!

stats.Special Effect: Accumulate XP in battle. When maxed, choose an ability to upgrade for powerful boosts

abilities.name: DEADPOOL IN YOUR AREA - VANGUARD
abilities.description: Want to hurt my team? Good luck! I hit you with a taunt, mess up your vision, and burn your health nonstop! Best part: my swords and guns go full turbo for the duration. Blink and you'll miss it

stats.Special Effect: Disrupt enemies' vision in range and gain XP. Enemies can damage Deadpool to end the disruption. Increase left-click attack speed for the duration.
stats.Spell Field Range: A cylindrical spell field with a 6m radius and a height of 6m.

abilities.name: KICK@$$ KATANA - VANGUARD
abilities.description: Protecting my team means my katanas go full savage. No mercy for the baddies!

stats.Attack Interval: First strike: 0.6s; second strike: 0.53s; third strike: 0.6s

abilities.name: THE BIG TEST
abilities.description: Wake the #!&% up, hero! We've got a game to win! Speed and healing buffs for starters, bonus Hazardous Hijinks for me, and extra HP for me and my nearby friends. Hit enough baddies with the right abilities exactly as I ask, and you unlock mega speed and healing, plus reset my Healing Factor cooldown!. Team protection mode: activated!

stats.Ability Duration: The challenge lasts 12s. The buff lasts 6s after you complete it.

abilities.name: HAZARDOUS HIJINKS - VANGUARD
abilities.description: Try getting to my teammates, I dare you! My dash slash knocks fools down, and if I hit, I get to do it again. Up to three times, baby!

stats.Special Effect: Refresh the cooldown if it hits an enemy for up to 2 times.

abilities.name: DUAL DESERT EAGLES - VANGUARD UPGRADED
abilities.description: I rack up shots, then, BOOM! A mind-blowing bubble bomb for all the enemies. Teammate security: maximum

stats.Projectile Attack Interval: After every 5 beam bullets fired, the next shot fires 1 additional projectile

abilities.name: KICK@$$ KATANA - VANGUARD UPGRADED
abilities.description: Relax, you've got Deadpool on your side! Swords out, baddies out. My stab hits crit, and a Bad Bunny hit makes the next swing a stabby special

stats.Attack Interval: First strike: 0.5s; second strike: 0.43s; third strike: 0.5s

abilities.name: DEADPOOL IN YOUR AREA - VANGUARD UPGRADED
abilities.description: Teammates, stay safe! Dummies, look here! It's showtime: I taunt, blind you, and hit warp speed with my swords and guns. Plus, my crew gets a damage reduction buff, so they're basically invincible. Dummies that stick around too long will even have their UI taped over!

stats.Special Effect: Disrupt enemies' vision in range and gain XP. Enemies can damage Deadpool to end the disruption. Increase left-click attack speed for the duration.
stats.Spell Field Range: A cylindrical spell field with a 6m radius and a height of 6m

abilities.name: HAZARDOUS HIJINKS - VANGUARD UPGRADED
abilities.description: Watch this pro bodyguard in action! I dash forward, nail the bad guy, and bounce in any direction I want. Oh, and I can do this two more times real quick!

stats.Cooldown: 2 charges, with each charge taking 10s to recharge.
stats.Special Effect: Refresh the cooldown if it hits an enemy for up to 2 times. Deadpool bounces as the ability hits an enemy.

abilities.name: MAGICAL UNICORN SHIELD! - UPGRADED
abilities.description: My ultra-cool, super shiny, extra huggable, and totally blinged-out plushy. Toss it ahead, and it lands as an invincible sphere of awesomeness! Blocking attacks and keeping my team safe inside our furry fortress

abilities.name: THE BIG TEST - UPGRADED
abilities.description: Hey, player! Warm-up's over, time for the main event! Speed, healing, dashes, for me, and bonus HP for all! Smash enough baddies with the skills I say, and you unlock super buffs (massive speed and healing), plus Healing Factor resets. For some time after, each hit means more HP for the crew and you. Don't mess this up!

stats.Ability Duration: The challenge lasts 12s. The buff lasts 8s after you complete it.

abilities.name: THE BAN HAMMER - UPGRADED
abilities.description: Upgraded courtroom drama! Congrats, unlucky one! You're my pick; enjoy the taunt! I score bonus health and healing, and you take ongoing damage. If you miss an ability while court is in session, it's a double whammy. You get more pain, AND I get more extra HP! Thanks in advance!

abilities.name: DUAL DESERT EAGLES - DUELIST
abilities.description: Bang! Bang! Unleash two hand cannons left and right, because one gun is never enough. Pew pew, baby!

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 18m, decreasing to 80% at 30m

abilities.name: SKILL ISSUE
abilities.description: Let's play judge! Pick a dumb-dumb and slap a taunt. They miss an ability? Boom! Gavel drops, and I slap them with pain and snark

abilities.name: HEADSHOT! - DUELIST
abilities.description: Ever seen someone throw their own face? Watch me KO a crowd, then catch my mug on the rebound!. Don't lose your head over it

stats.Casting: Single-cast projectile with delayed impact that also generates a spell field

abilities.name: BUNNY HOP
abilities.description: Hippity-hoppity, Deadpool's on your property! Watch me squeeze in a second jump midair! Hop on heads or kick off walls with Bunny Hop to refresh the cooldown, and if I land on someone? Free health for me, and a headache for them. Whee!

stats.Special Effect: Refresh the cooldown if it hits an enemy.

abilities.description: Slicey, dicey, twice as nicey! Swing both swords at whoever gets too close. Sushi, anyone?

abilities.name: POP QUIZ!
abilities.description: Hey, you! Yeah, you! Ready for a challenge? Free speed and healing just for trying. Nail enough hits with the right abilities and unlock the deluxe speed-heal package. It's an A+ in chaos!

stats.Ability Duration: The challenge lasts 12s. The buff lasts 6s after you complete it.

abilities.name: HAZARDOUS HIJINKS - DUELIST
abilities.description: Blink, and you'll miss my deadly dash combo. Slash, dash, repeat! Hit someone? You get to go again! (Up to 2 more times. Don't get greedy.) Who says I can't multitask?

stats.Cooldown: 2 charges, with each charge taking 10s to recharge.
stats.Special Effect: Refresh the cooldown if it hits an enemy for up to 2 times.

abilities.name: BUNNY HOP

stats.Special Effect: Refresh the cooldown if it hits an enemy or an ally. Transform the next katana base attack to a Stab.

abilities.description: Keep blasting till you trigger a BOOM. My thoughts literally explode onto the battlefield. Talk about mind-blowing firepower!

stats.Projectile Attack Interval: After every 5 beam bullets fired, the next shot fires 1 additional projectile

abilities.name: KICK@$$ KATANA - DUELIST UPGRADED
abilities.description: Now with extra chop! Stabs can go straight for the noggin. Heads up! Do a Bunny Hop and POW! Stabby Stabby action guaranteed! Run while you can!

stats.Attack Interval: First strike: 0.5s; second strike: 0.43s; third strike: 0.5s

abilities.name: DEADPOOL IN YOUR AREA - DUELIST UPGRADED
abilities.description: Check out the best trash talk in the Chronoverse! Keep taunting and melting their HP! I even block their screen, so they can't see squat. Plus, I tank hits like a champ. Enemies that stick around too long get the bottom of their screen taped up. By the end, they won't even find their health bar and whatnot. Good luck fighting what you can't see, suckers!

stats.Special Effect: Disrupt enemies' vision in range and gain XP. Enemies can damage Deadpool to end the disruption.
stats.Spell Field Range: A cylindrical spell field with a 6m radius and a height of 6m

abilities.name: HAZARDOUS HIJINKS - DUELIST UPGRADED
abilities.description: Now with bouncy castle action! Slash, bounce, repeat. It's like the world's deadliest pinball!. Cooldowns? Never heard of 'em. Keep going as long as you hit stuff, just don't let me fall flat on my ass!

stats.Cooldown: 2 charges, with each charge taking 10s to recharge.
stats.Special Effect: Refresh the cooldown if it hits an enemy. Deadpool bounces as the ability hits an enemy.

abilities.name: HEADSHOT! - DUELIST UPGRADED
abilities.description: Juggle my noggin for extra throws! If you catch it thrice, it goes kaboom. Everyone gets a piece of my mind

stats.Spell Field Duration: First unleash: 1s; second unleash: 1s; third unleash: 2s

abilities.name: POP QUIZ! - UPGRADED
abilities.description: Don't just stand there, you blockhead! The challenge's still rolling. But don't worry, I'm not one of those money-hungry scam artists. The buffs are on the house, no price hike. Take on this challenge, and you'll get three freebies: a little Speed boost, Continuous Healing, and Damage Up. Hit enough baddies with the right abilities exactly as I ask, and you unlock the ultimate bundle (Super Speed, Super Healing, Damage Boost AND reset all your cooldowns (except Healing Factor; no cheating!). Now THAT'S love

stats.Ability Duration: The challenge lasts 12s. The buff lasts 8s after you complete it.

abilities.name: SKILL ISSUE - UPGRADED
abilities.description: Dumbpoochu, I choose you! Taunt time! Their HP melts away, and if they whiff an ability, they get bonus pain AND Vulnerability. Double whammy! Objection? Overruled!

stats.Vulnerability Ration From Ability Missed: 10% for each stack. Up to 4 stacks.

received.name: Comical Chaos
received.description: Deadpool hands Jeff the Land Shark a plushie with attitude. Jeff can spit it ahead where it'll continuously Taunt nearby enemies and Block Vision, while allies in range enjoy a plush-powered healing party!

base.description: Receive upgrades from Hel, allowing the Desert Eagles or Katanas to be upgraded one additional time. Hel-Yeah Desert Eagles: Duelist and Vanguard gain pierce, and the thought bubbles transform into homing death-rattle bubbles. Strategist death-rattle bubbles also home in on allies, exploding to provide healing. Hel-Yeah Katanas: Every strike injects undead energy into the enemy. Hitting an enemy three times with the Katanas detonates the energy, dealing percentage-based true damage scaling off their max Health.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Hela, BOTH the Desert Eagles and Katanas can be upgraded one extra time.

stats.Special Effect: Both Desert Eagle and Katana can be further upgraded

base.description: Activate for kinetic energy, propelling Deadpool in a forward leap. Upon landing, he scatters a ring of kinetically charged chimichangas that deal damage to enemies.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Gambit, the kinetic energy causes Deadpool's landing to inflict a Stun effect on enemies in the blast radius.
